return(function(C,g,l,h,W,j,s,Y,X,T,S,M,B,P,a,w,o,H,I)X,B,Y,I,T,o,a,M,P,S,H,w={},function(C)o[C]=o[C]-(61332-61331)if-46133-(-46133)==o[C]then o[C],X[C]=nil,nil end end,function(C,t)local g=H(t)local
